name: ytaudio-search
description: Search the YTAudio library — transcribed YouTube audio across all channels

tools.name: ytaudio_search
tools.description: Search transcribed YouTube audio by keyword or phrase. Returns matching tracks with title, channel, date, and transcript snippet.

query.description: The keyword or phrase to search for in transcripts and titles

channel.description: Optional: filter by channel ID to restrict search to a specific channel

tools.name: ytaudio_list_channels
tools.description: List all channels in the YTAudio library with their track counts.

tools.name: ytaudio_list_tracks
tools.description: List recent tracks from the YTAudio library, optionally filtered by channel.

channel.description: Optional channel ID to filter tracks
